title: RoadTrip: VS x Create
description: modpack for building vehicles and mobile bases aroud VS and Create mods
body:
Vehicle and mobile bases building themed modpack using **Vakyrien skies** and **Create**.

Roadtrip adds various tools for player to build functional mobile instances in form of cars or tanks With **Trackwork**, planes with **Clockwork** and large ships or airships with **Eureka ships**

All that you build inside the mobile base will work like normally in the world, chests, furnaces, create machines, crops, etc, inclusive your bed for save you spawnpoint.

_At this moment this is a work in progress, it will have some bugs, progress and recepies inconsistencies, in the next versions there gonna be a path for new players that don't know much about the mods and content of the modpack_
